Off Calendar Aug-15-2023 Continued To Sep-20-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated Dec-27-2007 is admitted to probate. Brian Foster is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $45,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Aug-15-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Aug-08-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.
